title: zehneria subcoriacea
intro: Zehneria subcoriacea, also known as the Small Leafed Prickly Cucumber, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its use in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Zehneria subcoriacea include its ability to help manage various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Zehneria subcoriacea is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it has also been used in various herbal preparations, including teas and tinctures.
